LightningComponentBundle.description: Member-facing inline panel for entering promo codes at checkout. Validates per code, renders error banners, surfaces total savings. Embedded in the parent Checkout LWC.

property.name: orderId
property.label: Order Id
property.description: The Order the entered codes apply to.

property.name: disabled
property.label: Disabled
property.description: When true, all inputs and buttons are disabled.
